And if you look at the game, then you're being in state, and you say the words, and you start moving like that, and then what happens, you start almost always being in flow, so, like, the difference between a mediocre salesperson, an amazing salesperson, is not how good they are at opposite of overcomes, it's the consistency that they continue to hit hot streets. Great salespeople are just hot always. Mediocre ones are hot and cold and hot and cold, because they don't know how to, they don't know how to recreate the symphony of like sales flow. A guy who's really experienced always gets in the zone, never gets thrown off, doesn't get shaken by some girl who blows up, like, because they're mentally tough, and that's what having lots of sales in your belt does, is you're like, listen, people haven't changed, I've been 2,000 of these, I've been 4,000 of these, no one's changed.
